example_reviews: Sleep music selection is amazing but I wish there were more variety in the Sleepcasts.
The bedtime wind-down course helped me establish a consistent sleep schedule for the first time.
The Forest Rain Sleepcast is pure magic. Fall asleep in minutes every time.

groups.theme: Guided meditation quality and course progression
example_reviews: Andy Puddicombe is a gifted teacher. His voice and pacing make even complex mindfulness concepts feel accessible.
The 30-day Stress course and my anxiety levels are measurably lower.
I am 67 years old and was hesitant about meditation apps. The simple interface and Andy patient voice made it approachable.

groups.theme: Subscription value, paywalls, and cancellation experience
example_reviews: 12.99 a month is too expensive for what is essentially an audio app.
Family plan covers 6 members at a reasonable price.
Three day free trial is not enough time to evaluate the full library.
Background audio stops playing the moment I switch to another app on Android 14.
Google account sign-in is broken on the latest app version.
Headspace broke something in its last update that makes the app run at double speed on my device.
The mood check-in at the start of each session is a great feature but the recommendations do not seem to actually respond to what I tell it.
Content for children is excellent. My 8 year old daughter uses the kids section independently.
The commuter meditation series designed to be used in noisy public spaces is genuinely clever design.
